architecture_overview: Express.js/Node.js backend using ES Modules, MongoDB via Mongoose 8, JWT-based auth with access/refresh tokens, Redis for token blacklisting, Cloudinary for media storage. Layered architecture: config → middleware → routes → controllers → models → services → utilities. Currently focused on auth system (login, register, logout, refresh, verify-email, forgot/reset-password). RBAC system with Role and Permission models. Email service using Mailtrap with HTML templates and queue system.

critical_tasks.title: Remove Exposed Secrets from .env File and Rotate All Credentials
Fix Redis Package Mismatch (ioredis import vs redis in package.json)
Fix Error Handler Middleware Placement in index.js (Placed Before Routes)
Fix Login Controller Logging Credentials to Console
Fix getBlacklistStats() Auto-Execution at Module Import
Fix Broken Imports in logoutController.js (Non-Existent Paths)
Remove Duplicate Cloudinary Configuration (Already in config/cloudinary.js)

important_tasks.title: Remove Massive Commented-Out Legacy Code from All Files
Consolidate Duplicate Controller Files (registerController.js, refreshTokenController.js, logoutController.js)
Remove Unused Route Files (routes/auth/register.js, refresh.js, logout.js with stale imports)
Remove Temp/Debug Files (controllers/auth/temp.js, temp2.js, headache.txt, postman.txt, indicator.html)
Fix Inconsistent Cookie Names Between Controllers (jwt_client vs refreshToken)
Replace In-Memory Rate Limiting Maps with Redis-Backed Solution
Fix Password Min-Length Inconsistency (6 in register validation vs 8 in login validation and User model)

enhancements.title: Split Monolithic auth-controller.js (1189 Lines) into Single-Responsibility Controllers
Add Centralized Error Classes and Error Constants
Add Health Check Endpoint for Production Readiness
Add API Versioning Strategy Documentation and Guard
Add Database Indexes Documentation and Audit for Performance
Replace console.log/console.error with Structured Logger (pino is already in package.json)
Add Comprehensive Request/Response DTOs and Type Safety

notes: Audit performed on 2026-02-21. No code changes made yet.
Backend uses ES Modules (type: module in package.json).
Registration does not assign roles (auth-controller.js version) unlike registerController.js which does — inconsistency.
corsOptions and corsConfig are both exported from cors-options.js but corsConfig is never used.
handleVerifyEmail references sendWelcomeEmail function that is not imported in auth-controller.js.
